steps.title: Use continues as the clue
steps.content: Ramos still uses Apollo mission data while studying tectonic activity on the Moon. That continued use shows the missions' scientific value has persisted beyond the original landings.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means replaced or pushed aside, contradicting the continued use. Choice C refers to being first or from the beginning, not still useful. Choice D suggests dispute, but no controversy is mentioned. The answer is B.
